cross_scene_arcs.title: Securing Wealth
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dog extracts stash locations through torture, distributes the proceeds to his crew, and later escapes with additional money and guns.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Torturing Gordon to reveal hidden stash
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Escaped with a suitcase of money and two antique shotguns

cross_scene_arcs.title: Crew Management and Operations
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dog reinforces his authority by distributing loot, plans an attack with Plank, and orders systematic investigation and torture to find culprits.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Distributing money and pills to his lads
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ordering house search and torture of suspects
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Identity of those responsible for surveillance not identified

cross_scene_arcs.title: Cycle of Violence
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Dog escalates violence against enemies, is ambushed and captured, frees himself and orders revenge, but later suffers a brutal beating.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Threatening to shoot toes to force gate open
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Brutally beaten and thrown around like a rag doll by Big Chris
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Extent of injuries and potential for further retaliation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Debt to Hatchet Harry
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ed enters a high-stakes card game, loses and incurs a £500,000 debt to Hatchet Harry, shares the burden with friends, plans to handle it without his father, and is summoned by Harry under threat.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ed enters the boxing club for the card game while his friends remain outside.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Ed is required to go to Hatchet's office as ordered.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: What will happen when Ed meets Hatchet.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Police Custody and Release
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ed is detained and interrogated by police while physically distressed, then released with a warning to stay out of trouble.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Undergoing interrogation by the sergeant while physically distressed.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Ed will heed the SERG's warning.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Criminal Schemes and Robbery
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ed participates in a street scam with Bacon, collects money from Soap for a scheme involving Harry, and later secures keys during a robbery ambush.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Ed has escaped into an alley and is at a distance from police.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Has the keys and is expected to meet Eddy in the van.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the robbery and escape will succeed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Group Dynamics and Self-Preservation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After disclosing the shared debt, Ed plans to avoid telling his father, but later panics and abandons the group when their house is found looted and covered in blood.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Friends are informed of the shared debt, with Tom reacting violently and group tension present.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Leaves the group immediately in panic.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: What happened to the money and gear, and who is responsible for the corpses.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Financial Schemes and Heist Operation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom moves from suspicion about money schemes to investment discussions, then faces a debt threat, plans and prepares for a heist to retrieve stolen goods, but the operation fails catastrophically.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Suspicious about the fat man in a money-collection scheme.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Heist fails; money and drugs are lost, replaced by corpses.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to deal with the failed plan and ongoing debt.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confrontation, Violence, and Disposal Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Tom's behavior escalates from confronting Ed over preparation to violent assault during the heist, leading to group anger over his retention of guns and a perilous disposal attempt on a bridge.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Asserting authority by confronting Ed for not resting before a card game.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Frozen on a bridge, clinging to the rail with guns, facing a critical choice.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The immediate decision between dropping the guns or answering the phone.
